query:
-- All billing items for Mega Electrics across all imports
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.invoiceNumber, bi.invoiceDate, bi.description, 
       bi.lineAmount, bi.accountCode, bi.category,
       bi.serviceExternalId, bi.matchStatus, bi.matchConfidence,
       s.serviceType, s.planName, s.supplierName, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN services s ON s.externalId = bi.serviceExternalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = 'C0159'
ORDER BY bi.invoiceDate DESC, bi.description;

-- Check what categories/matchStatus values exist in billing_items overall
SELECT category, matchStatus, COUNT(*) as cnt 
FROM billing_items GROUP BY category, matchStatus ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;
